Node Types & Colors
Root Node - Starting point of the search tree
Thinking Node - Internal reasoning step
Action Node - Executable action (click, scroll, etc.)
Other Node - Miscellaneous node types
Terminal Node - End of search path
Rollout Reward Colors
No Reward (≤ 0) - Failed or neutral outcome
Low Reward (0 < r < 0.5) - Partial success
Medium Reward (0.5 ≤ r < 0.75) - Good progress
High Reward (0.75 ≤ r < 1.0) - Near success
Perfect Reward (= 1.0) - Complete success
Visual Indicators
Selected Node - Red border indicates current selection
Rollout Edge - Dashed line connects nodes to rollouts
Tree Edge - Solid line shows parent-child relationships
How to Use

Click any node to view its details in other tabs

Hover over nodes to see quick information

Drag to pan the graph view

Scroll to zoom in/out on the graph

Switch tabs to view different aspects of the selected node
